title: Automation Audit History
excerpt: Unless I am missing something, I do not see an audit log for automation and integration changes. We have a LOT of users and a LOT of automations/integrations. We need to be able to see who turned on or turned off an auto…

posts.author: mikayla (Mikayla Barber)
posts.cookedHtml: Unless I am missing something, I do not see an audit log for automation and integration changes. We have a LOT of users and a LOT of automations/integrations. We need to be able to see who turned on or turned off an automation. If the information in the automation is changed, we need to be able to see that as well.
